Ntc Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Christopher Hall, Esq. appeared for the plaintiffs Maria O Ramos and Talab Qarajah, were sworn and direct examined.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Maria Elfar and Joseph Elfar.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $50,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $11,095.89
Costs $760.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $61,855.89
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Off Calendar
